new_classes.label_en: Still Fermented Beverage from Concentrated Grape Must in Containers of 2 Litres or Less (CN 22060051)
new_classes.label_de: Anderes stilles Gärerzeugnis aus konzentriertem Traubenmost in Behältnissen bis 2 Liter (KN 22060051)
new_classes.definition_en: Still fermented beverage produced from concentrated grape must (not the product of natural fermentation of fresh grape must), presented in containers holding 2 litres or less, classified under CN code 22060051 (Chapter 22). The must is stable, stored, and fermentation is typically started with yeast; sugar may also be added.

coverage_explanation: The key distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) the product is a still (non-sparkling) fermented beverage, (2) produced from concentrated grape must rather than natural fresh-grape fermentation, (3) in containers holding ≤ 2 litres. The production distinction (concentrated must, yeast-started fermentation, possible sugar addition) is partially captured via the complement restriction on GrapeFermentation and the FruitFermentation someValuesFrom (as the closest available process class for non-standard grape fermentation). However, a dedicated 'ConcentratedGrapeMustFermentation' process class would more precisely capture the concentrated-must production route. The sugar-addition aspect and the stable/storable character of the input must are not fully axiomatised due to absence of suitable properties in the TBox. The container volume upper bound (≤ 2 L) is captured via a decimalRange restriction on maxContainerVolumeL.
